ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the region's governor */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where cases are reported */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "confirmed_change" INTEGER /* Change in confirmed cases since the last report */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recoveries reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total active cases in the region */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated in the region */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for secure login */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the update */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., new case, recovery, death) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_records" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the death */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of the death */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the death occurred */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the deceased */,
  "pre-existing_condition" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical condition (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_records_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_records" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the recovery */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of the recovery */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the recovery occurred */,
  "recovery_method" TEXT /* Method of recovery (e.g., hospitalization, home isolation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_records_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total recoveries reported */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total active cases in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population vaccinated in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "vaccines_offered" TEXT /* Types of vaccines offered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)
